title: Cell passage protocol for TR146 human buccal carcinoma cell line
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"94bdf","text":"This protocol outlines the maintenance, subculturing, and cryopreservation of TR146 oral squamous carcinoma cells for use in cancer research","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"b9hag","text":"Ensure a sterile environment to prevent cell contamination","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"44dn1","text":"DMEM/F12 Medium with 10% FBS","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"atc0m","text":"Trypsin-EDTA (0.25%)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dsti8","text":"DMSO (20% in Medium)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c6557","text":"PBS (Phosphate-Buffered Saline)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3ur36","text":"15 mL Conical Tubes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bcm8o","text":"Tissue Culture Flasks (T75, T50, T25)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9qb2","text":"Transfer Pipettes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c838j","text":"Centrifuge","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9d5sg","text":"37°C Water Bath","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cb1n7","text":"Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Aspirate spent media using sterile vacuum system
Wash monolayer with 5 mL PBS at room temperature
Incubate immediately for 5 min at 37°C (5% CO₂)
Resuspend pellet in 3 mL fresh medium
Resuspend pellet from step 6 in 1.5 mL medium
creator: Boluwatife OLU OLU Afolabi
